capability_graphs.scenario_brief: A $480K enterprise renewal is at risk. The product champion left, a breaking API change hit the customer's pipeline, and the new decision-maker is evaluating a competitor.

comm_graph.slack_initial_message: Apex renewal war room is live.

messages.subject: Re: Master Agreement
messages.body_text:
[Historical email excerpt]
I did receive your e-mails and apologize for my late response.  Yes, I will 
be the negotiating person for the agreement with the exception of credit 
terms and issues, but will also be involved in the background with credit.  

I hope to  e-mail you my comments by the end of next week.

Regards,
Debra Perlingiere
Enron North America Corp.
1400 Smith Street, EB 3885
Houston, Texas 77002
dperlin@enron.com
Phone 713-853-7658
Fax  713-646-3490

[Excerpt limited by source data. Original body may be longer.]

Event type: message_reply
